case_number: Criminal Bail Application is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail Appln. No. S – 614 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of bail application 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail application 24.10.2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< None has appeared on behalf of the applicant nor any intimation is received. This is second call, it is now 11:35 am. The absence on the part of the applicant and his Counsel reflects that they are no more interest to pursue the same. Accordingly the instant Criminal Bail Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge ARBROHI
